'''''Titan''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] which once orbited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Harridan (planet)|Harridan]].

==History==
While in orbit, it snagged a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ship in its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] in order to inspect the ship as it was leaving the planet. Shortly afterwards, the Rebel ship was attacked by [[Egot Pai-4-Yem]] in the ''[[Razorshark]]''. Following his duties, the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the ''Titan'' moved to intercept the ''Razorshark'', and managed to capture it in its tractor beams, which allowed the Rebel ship to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
